title: Roadmap Ledger
description: The project work ledger: every item of intended work with status, provenance, and links to the artifacts that prove each status transition. The dispatcher workflow selects work from this document.

updated.description: ISO 8601 date of the last edit to this ledger

id.description: Roadmap item ID, sequential per project, never reused

status.description: Lifecycle status. Each transition requires its artifact in links: designed needs a cluster or decision, briefed needs briefs with clean coverage, dispatched needs a workflow run, landed needs commits. dropped requires the reason in notes.

kind.description: What sort of work this is

summary.description: What this item delivers and why it matters — one paragraph

requested_by.description: Who asked for this (person or process)

date.description: ISO 8601 date the item entered the ledger

quote.description: Verbatim words of the request when they carry load-bearing intent; empty string when no quote applies. Paraphrase drifts — quote.

context.description: Where this came from: the conversation, incident, or review finding that produced it

cluster.description: Cluster directory name under docs/design/ once designed; empty string before that

decisions.description: ADR IDs this item produced or depends on

briefs.description: Brief IDs that deliver this item

commits.description: Commit hashes on main that landed this item

depends_on.description: Roadmap items that must land first — direct dependencies only

notes.description: Anything the other fields don't carry: open questions, sequencing rationale, drop reason. Empty string when none.
